calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-18-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:00am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk-Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant Hill & Company appears through counsel Karen L. Moore, and Ms. Espinoza from Hill & Co. Respondent Frances Szeto appears with counsel George Eshoo. Parties previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.

EXHA(1) Contractors License
EXHA(2) Property Management Agreement
EXHA(3) Expense Distribution Sheet

EXHR(A) 7 photos
EXHR(B) Letter to Mr. Roy, including copies of receipts - 10 pages

Mr. Eshoo, counsel for respondent, is requested to fax a document to Judge Pro Tem Myles for further clarification and must provide to Appellant as well.
11:00am
Exhibits retained, matter taken under submission.
